arch=A55, core=1, stride=5, train_accesses=5, max_competitors=20, rounds=100, page_step=1, probe_lines=64, threshold=120 ns
config default train_accesses=5
# store-stride entry-capacity test
# stride=320 rounds=100 page_size=4096 store_pc=0x0000000500000120 victim_buffer=0x0000000600000000
# STRIDE_LINES=5 TRAIN_ACCESSES=5 COMPETITOR_ACCESSES=6 PROBE_LINES=64 max_competitors=20 page_step_pages=1
# victim training: 5 stores, stride_lines=5
# victim trigger line: 31
# victim probe/predicted line: 25

# lower latency means that victim line was more likely prefetched
